Customer Sally Dominguez at ADBL, HBL conducted 1 Cash Withdrawal transfer transaction(s) totaling NPR 21807.13 on 2022-10-07 to Henry King. Suspicious pattern: Cash Withdrawal. During the branch's periodic transaction-monitoring review, the compliance desk at ADBL examined the account held by Sally Dominguez after an internal threshold alert was triggered. For context, the customer's KYC file lists a modest declared income profile; in the reviewing officer's judgement the velocity and aggregate value of the funds are not fully consistent with that profile. It is worth noting that no adverse media or sanctions matches were identified at the time of filing, and the customer has been with the institution for some years, which the desk weighed before escalating. Nonetheless, a number of the transfers appear to have been deliberately kept below reporting thresholds and were executed in rapid succession, a pattern the officer considers consistent with Cash Withdrawal. This report is submitted out of an abundance of caution for the compliance unit's further analysis and does not, by itself, constitute a determination of wrongdoing. Account number(s) not included in this summary for brevity.
